content.en:
"Okay, then carry out this plan!"

Lord Ogu agreed.

Friends of the dead Dao do not die of the poor Dao, and the Lord of the Ao Gu Kingdom naturally understands this truth.

If other living beings don't die, he won't care!

If there was no problem with the Eternal Dao Species, he might have vigorously opposed this plan, and even reprimanded the Tide River Master, but now he felt normal.

In order to survive, he dares to do anything.

"If you want to provoke the demon seed to riot, the general method is not good, you have to take out the cold sky magic stone, and stimulate the power of the cold sky magic stone in the demon seed abyss, this power is stimulated together, the demon seeds will not adapt to this power, and they will definitely escape from the demon seed abyss. "Bloody Eyes Dao Lord.

"Lord Aogu, the Cold Heaven Demon Stone is forbidden to be brought into the Demon Seed Abyss, and only if you have enough authority to let an Eternal Dao Realm bring it in, only you can do this. "The main road of the tide river.

"Okay, I'll leave it to me!"

Lord Oku nodded.

......

this day.

Demon Seed Abyss.

An Eternal Dao Realm infiltrated here, he was an Eternal Dao Realm under the command of the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom, and he was cultivating a second-class Eternal Dao Species, and the Eternal Dao Species was also very problematic, and he couldn't live long.

In addition, he has many descendants.

This time, the Lord of Ogu promised to take care of his descendants, allowing him to bring the Cold Sky Demon Stone here and stimulate it.

Once successful, it will nurture his descendants and allow his family to prosper forever.

Of course.

He didn't fully believe in Lord Ogu either, but he had no choice but to choose to believe.

In addition, he still has the slightest chance of survival.

As long as he activates the Cold Sky Demon Stone, and then leaves quickly and rushes out of the abyss of the Demon Seed, he is sure to survive.

Soon, he came to the abyss of the demon seed, and then somewhere on the periphery, he directly took out the Cold Sky Magic Stone, and then urged the power of the Eternal Dao Seed to urge the Cold Sky Demon Stone.

Rumble!!!!

The Cold Heaven Demon Stone shattered, forming a special aura that instantly permeated the entire Demon Seed Abyss.

And at this moment, there was a trace of the aura of the Eternal Demon Seed hidden inside the Cold Sky Demon Stone, and this breath of the Eternal Demon Seed directly locked him and merged into his Eternal Dao Seed.

Moreover, in the special place of the Demon Seed Abyss, he directly turned his Eternal Dao Seed into an Eternal Demon Seed.

Immediately, his consciousness was deprived by the demon seed and turned into a demon seed.

This is also one of the plans of the Ogu Lord, it is impossible for him to let this Eternal Dao Realm live, if he lives, there is no doubt that the Ogu Lord's plan may be exposed.

At that time, the lord of the ancient kingdom and the lord of the tide river will all die.

......

After the power of the Cold Sky Demon Stone exploded, the entire Demon Seed Abyss was filled with the energy aura of the Cold Sky Demon Stone, and suddenly a large number of Demon Seeds rushed out of the Demon Seed Abyss.

Rumble!!!!

All the formations of the first defensive circle were urged, and they resisted the attacks of the demon seeds for a while.

"Demon Seed Riot, Ask for Help!"

One by one, the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm asked for help from the outside world, and the news was passed to the hands of one country lord after another.

The capital of the ancient kingdom.

At this time.

The Lord of Ogu had already received the news and immediately laughed.

"The Tide River Lord, the Blood Eye Dao Lord, the plan has begun, the Demon Seed Abyss has rioted, the three defenses should be unstoppable, and the support is too late to pass. Lord Ogu said.

"Just wait for the demon seeds to rush into the ancient realm, and we can do it!"

"However, Lord Oku, you still have to pretend to be supportive, otherwise there will be trouble afterwards. "

"Okay, I'll go to help!"

The Lord of the Ancient Kingdom summoned a name under his command who had condensed the Eternal Dao Seed of the Eternal Dao Realm, and as for the Eternal Dao Realm that did not condense the Eternal Dao Seed, he would be sent to death if he went.

And within the Agu Kingdom, many top powers have also received information and have gone to support.

......

Outside the abyss of the demon seed, the first line of defense.

The formations were about to be overwhelmed.

Suddenly.

A demon seed appeared, attracting the attention of those of the Eternal Dao Realm.

"It's not good, it's the demon seed that the Phantom Blood Dao Master has turned into, this is the top demon seed!!!!"

"Hasn't he been staying in the depths of the Demon Seed Abyss, how did he escape!"

The Phantom Blood Dao Master, no, it should be called the Phantom Blood Demon Seed, smashed the formations with one hand.

Immediately.

He shattered the first line of defense with a single blow, and a Eternal Dao Realm body shattered to death.

These Eternal Dao Realms are all very weak Eternal Dao Realms, and only by relying on the formation can these demon seeds be stopped, without the formation, they are ants, and any demon seed can slaughter them.

Of course.

There are also some top-notch Eternal Dao realms, but when they saw that the defense line was broken, they fled directly as soon as possible, where did they dare to block it!

Soon.

The Demon Seed led by the Phantom Blood Demon Seed killed the second line of defense, and the second line of defense was slightly more powerful, killing more than a dozen demon seeds, but in the end it was broken.

Afterwards.

The demons have reached the third and last line of defense.

In the past, there were only one or two demon seeds killed here, but this time it was completely breached, and a large number of demon seeds were killed, and it was impossible to stop it at all.

At this time.

A group of Eternal Dao Realm ran directly from the third line of defense, and they all knew that they couldn't stop it, and they could only wait for death if they stayed.

Rumble!!!!

Under attack after attack, the third line of defense was shattered.

......

Roselle City.

"The Demon Seed Abyss is rioting, and the three lines of defense have been broken?"

Ye Tian received the news from the Nine Extremes Alliance.

All the members of the Nine Extremes Alliance rushed over to support, and Ye Tian also received the news that one of the replica bodies left Roselle City and then headed for the direction of the Demon Seed Abyss.

Meanwhile.

A demon seed rushed into the side of the ancient kingdom, killing and even devouring living creatures when they saw them, which was the instinct of the demon seed.

Meanwhile.

The Aogu Country Lord, the Tide River Lord, and the Blood-Eyed Dao Lord began to act, and secretly began to slaughter the Eternal Dao Realm, and they didn't care about these Eternal Dao Realm identities, as long as they were Eternal Dao Realm, they couldn't escape from their hands.

Of course.

They also captured a demon seed, and once they invaded a certain place, they released the demon seed and destroyed some of it, so that it could cause a demon seed invasion.

This is very safe, and there is no problem of mistakes.

And the Lord of the Agu Kingdom only targets the small forces, after all, the top big forces are not weak, if he can't solve them in an instant, he may expose the news.

And the small forces are too weak, and they will solve it with a wave of their hands.

this day.

Lord Ogu came to a city.

"Luo Shen City, there seems to be an Eternal Dao Realm here, so I will attack him!"

The lord of the Agu Kingdom said secretly.

He didn't know much about the intelligence, and he didn't know that Ye Tian was also in Roselle City.

Even if he knew, he wouldn't care!
